title: commelina glabra
intro: Commelina glabra, also known as the smooth commelina or smooth dayflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, Commelina glabra is often used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be dried and used in traditional remedies such as poultices and compresses.
